help.azure_ad: Register an app in Azure Portal > App registrations. Add redirect URI: {your-domain}/api/auth/sso/callback. Copy Application (client) ID and create a client secret.
help.okta: Create an OIDC Web Application in Okta admin. Set redirect URI to: {your-domain}/api/auth/sso/callback.
help.google: Create OAuth 2.0 credentials in Google Cloud Console. Add authorized redirect URI: {your-domain}/api/auth/sso/callback.
help.auth0: Create a Regular Web Application in Auth0. Add callback URL: {your-domain}/api/auth/sso/callback.
help.generic: Enter the OIDC issuer URL. The system will auto-discover endpoints via .well-known/openid-configuration.

ssoConfig.roleMappingHint: Map identity provider groups to application roles. Users in matched groups get the mapped role instead of the default.

aliases.title: Legal Entity Names
aliases.description: Register your organization's legal entity names (e.g. holding companies, subsidiaries, trading names). The AI uses these to correctly identify the counterparty when extracting contract metadata — any name listed here will be recognized as your organization, not the vendor.

descriptions.sso: Single Sign-On with Azure AD, Okta, Google

extraction.intro: AI metadata extraction returns a confidence score (0–1) for each field. Fields below the applicable threshold are dropped instead of overwriting existing values. Raise thresholds on critical fields if you'd rather have a blank than a low-confidence guess.
extraction.defaultThresholdHint: Applied to any field without a specific override below.
extraction.noOverrides: No overrides yet. All fields use the default threshold.

prompts.title: Prompt Customization
prompts.description: Extra instructions appended to the AI prompts for every contract in your tenant. Use this to give the AI domain knowledge it couldn't otherwise know — your terminology, your industry quirks, what to flag. Keep each instruction tight; max {{maxChars}} characters per agent.

placeholders.metadata: e.g. Treat 'Client' as our company, not the counterparty.
placeholders.clauses: e.g. Always flag references to HIPAA or HITRUST.
placeholders.obligations: e.g. Health-system contracts often phrase obligations as 'shall ensure'.
placeholders.slas: e.g. Uptime is reported as a quarterly average, not monthly.
placeholders.risks: e.g. Liability caps below $1M are a hard no for us.
